name: Banana Split Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (EXCEPT CHOCOLATE CHIPS AND CHERRIES) into the inner pan in the order listed; select white bread and press "Start."
2. Add the chips and cherries when the Auto Bakery beeps, 88 minutes into the cycle (33 minutes with Dak Gazette II).
3. Enjoy this delightful creation fresh, chilled, or toasted. For an extra special treat, spread it with cream cheese blended with minced maraschinos and their juice.
